title: Croton androiensis
taxonomy: Croton androiensis is a species of plant in the spurge family, Euphorbiaceae. It is native to Madagascar, which suggests that it may have evolved in isolation for a long period. The classification of the plant may also be influenced by its morphological characteristics, such as its leaves and stems. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
